name: sellerclaw
description: Operate your SellerClaw e-commerce and marketing channels from Claude — eBay, Shopify, Amazon, Meta Ads, Google Ads and more.
long_description: SellerClaw connects your e-commerce and marketing channels — eBay, Shopify, Amazon, Meta Ads, Google Ads and more — and this extension lets you operate them from Claude. Connect your integrations once on SellerClaw, then browse command groups, read a command's schema, and run it through three discovery tools. Sign in once with `sellerclaw auth login` — no API key to copy. Some actions (e.g. sending email or launching ad campaigns) still require the owner's approval, enforced server-side.

tools.name: sellerclaw_groups
tools.description: List SellerClaw command groups and the commands inside each.

tools.name: sellerclaw_describe
tools.description: Show one command's full schema: arguments, filters and body fields.

tools.name: sellerclaw_run
tools.description: Run a SellerClaw command and return the API response.

token.title: SellerClaw token (optional)
token.description: Leave empty if you have signed in with `sellerclaw auth login` in a terminal. Otherwise paste an agent token (starts with `sca_`).
